chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C. P. No. D – 4584 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on Misc. No. 21140/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.21141/2023 3. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2023. Mr. Naseer Ahmed, Advocate/Petitioner in person. --------------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J.- The Petitioner is an Advocate and has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution in his personal capacity seeking the issuance of directions to the Provincial Transport Department and its functionaries to remove a Bus Stand, which according to the him is being illegally and unlawfully operated at PSO Manzil Petrol Pump situated at Quaidabad Mair, Karachi. Per the Petitioner, an application has been moved by him in that regard to the relevant Department, but the same has remained unattended. Under the given circumstances, even if the case of the Petitioner is accepted at face value, the matter at best constitutes one of the maladministration on the part of the Department, which is a subject falling within the domain of the Provincial Ombudsman. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine alongwith the other pending miscellaneous application, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail such alternate remedy, if so desired. Judge Judge TariqAli/PA
